---
title: "À propos"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/benplante/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/benoit-plante-ph-d-c-42753353/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/benoitplante
---

About this blog
